info.title: The Music Repository API
info.description:
The Music Repository API — the single source of truth for the HTTP contract.
Compiles to OpenAPI 3.1 (`openapi.json`), which drives Orval (FE client + Zod) and the
backend Zod DTOs. Paths are declared ONLY here (never in NestJS decorators).

201.description: The request has succeeded and a new resource has been created as a result.

404.description: The server cannot find the requested resource.

204.description: There is no content to send for this request, but the headers may be useful.

post.description: Create a new environment (backfills a setting for every flag).

parameters.name: difficultyMin
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound on difficulty (1..10) — used by the level-band facet.

parameters.name: difficultyMax
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound on difficulty (1..10) — used by the level-band facet.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale to overlay published content translations for (e.g. `zh-Hans`); default/absent = base.

get.description: Fetch a single catalogue item (with taxonomy + presigned media) by slug.

get.description: Reference endpoint that always fails with a Problem Details 404 (proves the error pipeline).

get.description: The active (non-deleted, non-archived) environments, for the admin environment picker.

The evaluatable snapshot for an environment (public; consumed by the web SSR provider). Cache-busted
by the per-environment version via ETag / conditional GET → 304.
All help topics (the web preloads these to answer hovers without per-term fetches).

The locales the CMS knows about (for the admin locale pickers).
Current published-catalogue versions for every locale.

post.description: Open the customer billing portal — returns the URL to redirect to.

Start a subscription checkout — returns the URL to redirect to. The entitlement is granted by the
provider webhook (`POST /billing/webhook`) on completion, not here.

All stored review states for a deck (the client computes new/due from its deck definition).

201.description: The request has succeeded and a new resource has been created as a result.

BillingPortalSession.description: A payment-provider billing-portal session (manage card / cancel / invoices).

url.description: URL to redirect the browser to (Stripe Checkout, or the mock checkout page in dev).

CheckoutSession.description: A payment-provider checkout session to redirect the user to.

role.description: The acting user's relationship to the classroom.

premiumGranted.description: True once the teacher has granted premium to the class.

role.description: The acting user's relationship to the classroom.

premiumGranted.description: True once the teacher has granted premium to the class.

id.description: Internal id — used by the translations admin to key per-locale collection translations.

CollectionDetail.description: Full collection with its ordered items grouped into sections.

CollectionEntry.description: One ordered entry in a collection (a catalogue item at a position + curator annotations).

CollectionFacetValue.description: One facet value + its result count.

CollectionFacets.description: Discovery facets carried by a collection.

CollectionItemInput.description: One item in a structured items payload.

CollectionItemsInput.description: Ordered items that make up a collection (with notes + section links).

id.description: Internal id — used by the translations admin to key per-locale collection translations.

CollectionProgressDetail.description: Collection detail with per-item completion + overall progress (auth-aware).

CollectionRatingResult.description: Aggregate rating + the viewer's own rating after submitting.

CollectionSearchFacets.description: Facet distributions for the current collection search.

CollectionSearchResult.description: A page of collection search results + facets.

CollectionSectionInput.description: One chapter in a sections payload (ordered by array position).

CollectionSectionView.description: A chapter within a collection: an ordered group of entries.

CollectionSectionsInput.description: Replace the collection's chapters (ordered by array position).

CollectionWriteInput.description: Create/replace payload for an editorial collection (items/sections set separately).

tier.description: Premium plan that unlocks the item (`premium`/`pro`), if any.

genres.description: Taxonomy slugs — enough to drive admin axes/facets; labels derive client-side.

tier.description: For premium items: which plan unlocks it — "premium" or "pro".

locked.description: True when this is premium content the current viewer is not entitled to (body/media withheld).

id.description: Internal id — used by the translations admin to key per-locale content translations.

embeds.description: Preconfigured interactive tools to render below the prose (authored, from `details` JSONB).

ContentDetail.description: Full detail view of a catalogue item.

ContentDetails.description: Structured "facts" for the detail-page Details panel + the Era facet. All optional.

title.description: Optional heading shown above the embed.

caption.description: Optional explanatory caption shown under the heading.

tex.description: `score`: inline alphaTex source to render + play.

scoreSlug.description: `score`: reference an existing catalogue score by slug instead of inline `tex`.

tuning.description: `score` (tab): open-string MIDI pitches so a pitched score renders as tablature.

key.description: `progression`: key the Roman-numeral/chord progression is in, e.g. `A`.

pattern.description:
`strum`/`rhythm`: per-cell tokens over one bar, e.g. `["D","-","D","U","-","U","D","U"]`
(strum: `D`=down `U`=up `-`=rest) or note values (`rhythm`: `whole|half|quarter|eighth`).

ContentEmbed.description:
A preconfigured interactive tool embedded in a catalogue article, rendered (in order) below the
prose. The `tool` field selects which learning tool; the remaining optional fields configure it for
the specific lesson (a flat shape rather than a per-tool union to keep the generated DTO simple — the
web narrows on `tool`). Authored in the content Markdown's `embeds` block; stored in `details` JSONB.

ContentRevisionList.description: Version history for a content item, newest first.

authorId.description: Better Auth user id of who published this snapshot, if known.

ContentRevisionSummary.description: One saved content snapshot (written on publish).

ContentScoreInput.description: alphaTex source for a standalone score content item.

ContentStatusInput.description: Body for a direct status change (used by the admin manager's board + status menu).

tier.description: For premium items: which plan unlocks it — "premium" or "pro".

locked.description: True when this is premium content the current viewer is not entitled to (body/media withheld).

ContentSummary.description: List/card view of a catalogue item.

tier.description: For premium items: which plan unlocks it — "premium" or "pro".

details.description: Structured facts (key/era/form/composer/…) stored in the `details` JSONB.

related.description: Curated "if you like this" slugs, merged into `details.related`.

bodyDoc.description:
Canonical block-editor document (TipTap/ProseMirror JSON). Opaque — stored + returned verbatim,
never interpreted server-side; `bodyMdx`/`embeds` are the derived render fields.

ContentWriteInput.description: Create/replace payload for a content item. Taxonomy is given as slug arrays.

CreateFeatureFlagInput.description: Create a new (runtime) flag; initialised disabled in every environment.

CreateLocaleInput.description: Register a new locale so the CMS can author + import its strings.

durationDays.description: Days the granted premium lasts; omit for no expiry.

uses.description: How many times the code can be redeemed (default 1).

CreateRedeemCodeInput.description: Body for minting a gift code (staff only).

modality.description: Answer-input modality (multiple-choice | play-instrument | ear-identify | pitch-mic | rhythm-tap).

responseMs.description: Response latency in ms, if measured.

DrillAttempt.description: One objectively-graded drill attempt reported by the client.

isPersonalBest.description: True when this attempt set a new best rolling accuracy for the deck.

level.description: The deck's mastery level after this attempt (beginner…expert).

leveledUp.description: True when this attempt advanced the deck to a higher mastery level.

DrillAttemptResult.description: The result of recording an attempt: the SM-2 state after grading + the applied quality.

EntitlementEvent.description: One entry in the entitlement audit log.

FacetValue.description: One facet bucket (a value + its result count).

Facets.description: Available facets for the current result set.

FeatureFlagEnvironmentDto.description: A deployable environment flags can be targeted at.

enabled.description: Admin master switch for this environment (off ⇒ the feature is off).

defaultVariant.description: Variant returned when enabled and no targeting rule matches (e.g. "on").

variants.description: Named variant → value map (e.g. { on: true, off: false }).

targeting.description: Optional flagd-style JSONLogic targeting rule; null ⇒ use defaultVariant.

defaultValue.description: Code-registry fallback used if a variant can't be resolved.

FeatureFlagSettingDto.description: One flag's resolved configuration for an environment (as evaluated by

FeatureFlagSnapshot.description: The full evaluatable snapshot for one environment + its version tag.

FlagSettingWriteInput.description: Upsert one flag's per-environment setting (the core toggle + targeting).

id.description: Internal id — used by the translations admin to key per-locale help translations.

ImportFlagsInput.description: Bulk-import flags from a flags.json-shaped map (`key → { variants, defaultVariant, targeting, … }`).

label.description: Optional label used to auto-register the locale if it does not exist yet.

ImportStringsInput.description: Bulk import a locale's strings from a flat key→value map (upserted as drafts).

Invitation.description: A created invitation — the accept URL is returned so the teacher can share it directly too.

LocaleCatalogue.description: A locale's full published catalogue: every published, non-deleted key → its string.

LocaleInfo.description: A locale the CMS can author strings for (a superset of the routing locales).

LocaleVersions.description: The published-catalogue version tag per locale (the web cache-bust / ETag signal).

sourceUrl.description: Provenance URL of the engraving (source edition or transcription reference).

MediaAsset.description: A media file attached to a content item, with a ready-to-use (presigned) URL.

MediaUploadRequest.description: Request a direct-to-storage upload slot for a media file.

MediaUploadTicket.description: A presigned PUT ticket the browser uploads the bytes to.

MemberProgress.description: A member's completion across the class's assigned content.

PracticeInput.description: Log a practice session (optionally tied to a content item).

title.description: Short, stable, human summary of the problem type.

code.description: Stable machine-readable code — the programmatic contract.

traceId.description: W3C trace id for support correlation.

docUrl.description: Link to human documentation for this code.

ProgressSummary.description: Dashboard summary for the current user.

ProgressionChord.description: One chord in a saved progression: root pitch-class (0–11) + quality key.

PublishLocaleInput.description: Publish drafts for one locale, or all locales when `locale` is omitted.

RelatedContent.description: Related items — published content sharing genre/instrument/topic, ranked by overlap.

ReviewGrade.description: A recall grade: 0–5 (SM-2). Typically Again=2, Good=4, Easy=5.

ReviewState.description: SM-2 scheduling state for a single card.

SavedProgressionInput.description: The body sent when saving/updating a progression (keyed by name in the path).

SavedProgressionView.description: A saved progression as returned to the client.

SkillMastery.description: Rolling mastery for one deck/skill, computed from the attempt log.

source.description: How premium was granted: "subscription" (mock checkout), "staff" (admin/editor), or "none".

since.description: ISO timestamp premium was granted, when applicable.

TaxonomyRef.description: A taxonomy reference (genre / instrument / topic / tag).

TransferOwnershipInput.description: Transfer ownership to a current member (owner only).

TranslationPublishInput.description: Publish pending translation drafts for an entity (or all when omitted).

TranslationUpsertInput.description: Upsert a field translation — create the row or edit its draft.

publishedValue.description: Live value served to the site (null until first publish).

seeded.description: true = pristine seeded baseline; false = added or edited at runtime.

updatedBy.description: Better Auth user id of the last editor, if known.

UiMessageAdminRow.description: One admin table row for a message string.

UiMessageEditInput.description: Edit an existing message's draft value.

UiMessageRevisionSummary.description: One entry in a message's change history.

UiMessageWriteInput.description: Create a new message string (starts as a draft, `seeded=false`).

UpdateFeatureFlagInput.description: Edit a flag's registry fields (not per-environment).
